room.caption: [Vault Shifting Rooms C] And also breathe, always breathe... 4th dimensionally.

instance.creationCode: vaultString=" This room is completely safe."
vaultString=" I tried to counter his movements, but the chained one trapped me here."

GID_SET(257046, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=192 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_D} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_B}

GID_SET(257047, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=944 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_D} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_B}

GID_SET(257063, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=1360 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_D} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_B}

GID_SET(257064, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=192 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_D} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_B}

GID_SET(257065, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=944 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_D} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_B}

GID_SET(257066, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=1360 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_D} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_B}

GID_SET(257067, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=8 newStep=5 newTrans=17 newMapX=640 newMapY=48 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_B} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_D}
